text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "53-year-old patient admitted to the ER for aheadache associated with otorrhea and epistaxis with subsequent onset of altered voice/speech.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "COVID 19 vaccination - 3 doses.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: - lives alone - Behçet's syndrome with reported neurological involvement (no documentation available) - dolichomegacolon with severe chronic constipation -cavernoma T9-T10 (Zabramski type II) found after examinations for walking difficulties and right lower limb paresis (the patient reports neurosurgical visit without indications for surgery) - neurogenic bladder - smokes 7-8 cigarettes a day - SAD followed at Mental Health Center - appendectomy - videolaparoscopic excision of bilateral ovarian cysts ALLERGY TO METALS, IODINATED CONTRAST MEDIUM, AUGMENTIN Therapy: deltacortene 5 mg, constella, cymbalta 60 mg, cardioASA, PPI, minias, xanax, resolor, cereprix (?) The patient reports a recent job change and a worsening of her mood disorder associated with this change.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "On Feb 8th, around 5 p.m., the patient reports the onset of headache associated with left otorrhea and epistaxis and followed by alterations in voice and language.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Patient went to ER this morning due to the persistence of this problem.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Blood tests performed (normal, with neg CRP), brain CT (negative for acute events), ENT examination (no abnormalities in rhinoscopy, otoscopy and fibroscopy with mobile vocal cords, no signs of otorrhea).", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Physical Neurological Exam; alert, cooperative.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Cranial nerves: no ocular motility deficit, no visual field or facial deficits, normally positioned tongue.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Speech with an 'infantile' voice, some distorted words but if the speech is more prolonged and fluent, there are no word distortions.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Mingazzini I test with fine bilateral hypostenic tremors.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "No deficit in Mingazzini II test.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Hypoesthesia of the left side of the face and right lower limb (the latter for some time).", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "Paretic gait on the right (since discovering the dorsal cavernoma issue).", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "FNT correct bilaterally.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Conclusions: headache with voice alteration of unknown origin The patient reports having experienced a similar episode in the past with hospitalization at Molinette.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_15] ("2026-01-01", "No documentation available.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_16] ("2026-01-01", "Brain MRI with contrast medium is scheduled for 02/14/22 at 6:40 p.m. at our radiology department.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_17] ("2026-01-01", "The patient will have to premedicate with Cerchio 1 tablet per day in the three days prior to the examination.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_18] ("2026-01-01", "The patient must report to the radiology office by 4:00 p.m. in the next few days with a referral to be registered.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_19] ("2026-01-01", "Continue current therapy.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_20] ("2026-01-01", "Perform Doppler ultrasound of the supra-aortic vessels on an outpatient basis.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_21] ("2026-01-01", "Schedule a neurological examination with code B after the examination and bring all previous documentation.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_22] ("2026-01-01", "If other neurological disorders appear, go to the ER", 0.0, 0.5)
